auth.newPasswordSubtitle: Your account was created with a temporary password. Choose your own to continue.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code.
auth.codeSubtitle: We sent a verification code to {{email}}.
auth.choosePasswordSubtitle: Your code was verified. Set a new password to finish.
auth.passwordResetDone: Your password was reset. Please sign in.

validation.usernameLooksLikeEmail: Username cannot be an email address
validation.usernameInvalidChars: Use letters, numbers, dots, hyphens or underscores only
validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number, e.g. +14155552671

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: No connection. Check your internet and try again.
errors.userNotConfirmed: Your account is not confirmed yet. Contact your administrator.
errors.passwordResetRequired: You need to reset your password before signing in.
errors.codeExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.weakPassword: That password does not meet the requirements.
errors.invalidInput: Please check the details you entered.
errors.noOrganization: Your account is not linked to an organization yet. Contact your administrator.
errors.locationPermission: Location permission is required to check in.
errors.locationServicesOff: Turn on location services to check in.
errors.cameraPermission: Camera permission is required to take your selfie.
errors.outsideRadius: You are {{distance}} m from {{organization}}. Move within {{radius}} m to check in.
errors.faceNoMatch: That selfie does not match your profile photo. Please try again.
errors.faceNotDetected: We couldn't detect a face. Find better lighting and try again.
errors.noProfilePhoto: You have no profile photo yet. Contact your administrator.
errors.outsideRadiusSimple: You are outside your workplace area. Move closer and try again.
errors.notConfigured: The app is not connected to a backend yet.

org.setupSubtitle: This is a one-time step. Name your organization and add a logo.

admin.noEmployeesBody: Create your first employee to start tracking attendance.
admin.employeeUsernameHint: The employee signs in with this. It cannot look like an email address.
admin.employeeEmailHint: Their username and temporary password are emailed here.
admin.temporaryPasswordHint: The employee is asked to choose their own password on first sign-in.
admin.employeeCreated: Employee created. Their credentials were emailed to them.
admin.deleteEmployeeConfirm: Delete {{name}}? Their account and attendance history are removed permanently. This cannot be undone.
admin.companyLocationBody: Attendance is only accepted within this radius.
admin.locationNotSetBody: Set your company location before employees can check in.
admin.geofenceRuleOn: Employees go inactive as soon as they leave the radius, and active again when they return.
admin.geofenceRuleOff: Once checked in, employees stay active until they check out, wherever they go.
admin.attendanceModeManualBody: Employees tap to check in, with a location check and a selfie.
admin.attendanceModeAutomaticBody: Employees are checked in automatically when they arrive, with no selfie.
admin.attendanceModeAutomaticNative: Automatic mode needs the mobile app. It cannot run in a browser.
admin.presenceWindowHint: How long a location reading stays trustworthy before an employee is treated as away.
admin.noAttendanceBody: Records appear here as your team checks in.

employee.seenInsideJustNow: Inside the office area just now
employee.selfieNoticeTitle: You must take a selfie of yourself
employee.selfieNoticeBody: This photo becomes your profile picture and is used to verify it's really you when you check in. You only do this once.
employee.verifyBody: Take a quick selfie so we can confirm your identity before you sign in. It's matched against your profile photo.
employee.automaticModeBody: You are checked in automatically when you arrive at the office and checked out when you leave.
employee.locationPermissionBody: Attendance needs your location to confirm you are at the office.
employee.backgroundPermissionBody: Automatic check-in needs background location so you don't have to open the app when you arrive.
